category_sources: source_facts.description says it flashes STM32 using the ST serial bootloader; SourceForge project categorizes it under hardware and embedded systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stm32flash; official SourceForge project is named stm32flash.
docs_sources: Official stm32flash SourceForge site hosts the manual PDF; SourceForge project page is the official project surface.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project exposes a Code tab/source-control area for stm32flash.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and SourceForge project details identify STM32 flashing over serial bootloader from a command-line tool.
